title: Stardew Vision Extraction Output Schemas
description: Per-screen-type schemas for validating extraction agent JSON output. See ADR-009 and ADR-010.

pierre_shop.title: Pierre's Shop Detail Panel
pierre_shop.description: Extracted fields from the right-column item detail panel in Pierre's General Store.

name.description: Item name as displayed in the shop panel (e.g., 'Parsnip Seeds')

description.description: Item description text from the shop panel

price_per_unit.description: Cost per single item in gold

quantity_selected.description: Number of items the player has selected to purchase

total_cost.description: Total purchase cost in gold (price_per_unit * quantity_selected)

tv_dialog.title: TV Dialog Screen
tv_dialog.description: Extracted text from the in-game television program dialog box.

text.description: Full text content displayed on the TV screen

inventory_tooltip.title: Inventory Item Tooltip
inventory_tooltip.description: Extracted fields from the tooltip popup shown when hovering over an inventory item.

name.description: Item name as displayed in the tooltip

description.description: Item description text from the tooltip

sell_price.description: Sell price in gold, if displayed. Null if not shown (e.g., quest items).
